description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a predominantly white exterior and clean, geometric lines. The structure features large vertical windows on the sides, glass balcony railings, and a spacious rooftop terrace. The front facade includes a tall, narrow window column and a wooden deck at the entrance, while the rear and side elevations are more solid with fewer windows. The house is elevated slightly above ground level with a brick base trim and has multiple balconies and outdoor spaces. The flat roof and minimal ornamentation emphasize a contemporary architectural style. The use of glass, wood, and concrete materials is evident throughout the design.
description: A modern, multi-story house with large windows, glass balconies, and a flat roof, featuring a white facade and wooden deck accents.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the house with a tall vertical window, glass balcony railings, and a wooden deck at the entrance.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the rooftop terrace, multiple vertical windows, and the solid white facade with minimal openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid wall with minimal windows and a large rooftop terrace area.
description_view_3: This view shows the back and side of the house, featuring two entry doors, a small wooden step, and a flat roof section.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a wooden deck, glass door, and tall vertical window column; minimal overhang and no porch.
